title: Belmont Lakeside Holiday Park
address: 24 Paley Cres, Belmont South NSW 2280, Australia

title: Blacksmiths Beachside Holiday Park
description: Low-key 1- and 2-bedroom holiday units with kitchens on a modest property featuring an outdoor pool.
hotelDescription:
A 3-minute walk from Pacific Hwy Near Turea St's bus stop and 4 minutes from the beach, these modest holiday units are also 5 km from Belmont Golf Course.
 Down-to-earth 1- and 2-bedroom bungalows with streamlined kitchens include flat-screen cable TV, living areas with sofas and furnished decks; some offer DVD players. Caravan and campsites are also available.
 Amenities include a seasonal outdoor pool, tennis courts, a boat launch and a BBQ area. There's also a playground, and parking for 1 car per unit is included.

title: Paradise Palms Caravan Park Carey Bay
address: 42 Ambrose St, Carey Bay NSW 2283, Australia

title: The Bucketts Way Camp n Stay
address: 47 The Bucketts Way, Twelve Mile Creek NSW 2324, Australia

title: Swansea Lakeside Holiday Park
description: Informal cabins, some with kitchenettes and/or lake views, plus an outdoor pool & a playground.
hotelDescription:
Set on a peninsula between Lake Macquarie and the Pacific Ocean, this informal resort with private cabins is a 5-minute walk from Coon Island natural area, 4.5 km from Caves Beach, and has an on-site bus stop.
 Relaxed, cosy cottages offer separate bedrooms (some with bunk beds), flat-screen TVs and patios. Upgraded units add kitchenettes and air-conditioning. Some are poolside or have lake views; Wi-Fi is not available.
 Amenities include a communal kitchen, BBQs, coin-operated laundry facilities and a seasonal outdoor pool, plus a playground, tennis courts and a launch ramp. Camping and RV spaces are available.

title: Newcastle Beach
description: Renowned surf spot with a promenade & open-air ocean swimming pools fronted by an art deco pavilion.

title: Cohens on the Park

title: BIG4 Karuah Jetty Holiday Park
description: Airy cabins & bungalows, plus campsites, in a relaxed resort with an outdoor pool & a tennis court.
hotelDescription:
Set on the banks of the Karuah River at the edge of town, this laid-back resort is 12 km from Medowie Nature Reserve, 10 km from Wallaroo State Forest and 5 km from the A1 national highway.
 The airy, air-conditioned cabins feature kitchens, flat-screen TVs and living areas, plus shower-only bathrooms and private verandahs. Upgraded bungalows sleep up to 10 people.
 Parking is included. Other amenities consist of an outdoor pool, a playground, and a tennis court, plus a game room and BBQs. Kayak and bike rentals are available, as are RV and campsites.

title: Belmont Bayview Park
description: Casual hotel offering straightforward cabins with kitchens, plus an outdoor pool & a BBQ area.
hotelDescription:
Set 4 km from Blacksmiths Beach on the Pacific Ocean, this relaxed hotel on a residential street is 2 km from hiking at Green Point Foreshore Reserve and 5 km from Belmont Wetlands State Park.
 Unfussy 1-bedroom cabins feature kitchens and dining areas, plus flat-screens. Upgraded cabins add terraces and/or whirlpool baths. Family cabins sleep up to 6 guests.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool, a garden and a BBQ area. Camping sites are also available.

title: Foreshore Park
description: Urban park offering a shaded playground & restrooms, plus a picnic shelter, walking paths & benches.
